## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (warnings only are acceptable)
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Tested in Obsidian
- [ ] `manifest.json` / `versions.json` updated if releasing
